name: ExtensionSubstanceSourceMaterial_PartDescription
title: R5: To do (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `SubstanceSourceMaterial.partDescription` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`SubstanceSourceMaterial.partDescription` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `SubstanceSourceMaterial.partDescription` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `SubstanceSourceMaterial.partDescription` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `SubstanceSourceMaterial` is not mapped.
Element `SubstanceSourceMaterial.partDescription` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
